items.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
items.summary: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

items.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
items.summary: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

items.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
items.summary: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

items.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
items.summary: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
items.summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

items.title: For Eclipse, the $2.5B Cerebras win is just the start of realizing its  physical-world thesis
items.summary: Investing in the real world was lonely for Lior Susan 10 years ago. Now his firm finds itself at the center of the tech world's action.

items.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
items.summary: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

items.title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
items.summary: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

items.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
items.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

items.title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
items.summary: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits

items.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
items.summary: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

items.title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
items.summary: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

items.title: Users turn to jailbreaking their older Kindles as Amazon ends support
items.summary: It may be possible to jailbreak an older, end-of-support Kindle and continue adding books to it. But doing so carries risks.

items.title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12B across three startups and investors still want more
items.summary: Investors can't seem to get enough of RJ Scaringe or his ideas. Storytelling and communication are one of his superpowers, according to Jiten Behl, who joined Rivian when the company had just a handful of employees.

items.title: General Catalyst posted VC rage bait and it worked, especially on a16z
items.summary: Compulsive X user Marc Andreessen himself couldn't resist responding, many, many times.

items.title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
items.summary: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.

items.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
items.summary: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

items.title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
items.summary: Newly unredacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.

items.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
items.summary: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

items.title: Power prices are up 76% on America’s biggest grid, and a watchdog is pointing fingers
items.summary: The price spike is a reminder of a deeper problem: The U.S. power grid was not designed for the electricity demands of an AI-driven economy, and the gap between what the grid can deliver and what the industry needs is widening.
